name: Sebastian Azrael
sd_appearance: A towering, muscular tiefling with spiraled horns, crimson eyes blazing with determination, clads in frayed leather and weathered chainmail, adorned with the Adventurers Guild badge. His violet-grey skin is marred with deep scars, each a testament to past battles. A warhammer rests at his side, while a crossbow hangs from his shoulder, both bearing the signs of use and age. A single, elaborate silver ring adorns his left hand, its design a swirling maelstrom of shimmering colors, a unique mark of his fervent ambition within the guild.
faction_visual: rank-appropriate gear from leather to enchanted plate, Guild badge displayed
style_note: worn leather and chainmail, equipment that tells a story of past contracts
